name: SmolLM3 3B (No Thinking)
archDisplay: Dense transformer decoder, GQA (4 groups) + NoPE/RoPE 3:1 ratio, tied embeddings; single checkpoint with think/no_think dual reasoning modes
note: Non-reasoning (/no_think) mode of SmolLM3; faster inference, still outperforms other 3B non-reasoning instruct models.
tpsNote: Community-reported estimate for Q4_K_M GGUF inference on RTX 4090 (llama.cpp)

results.notes: BFCL (function/tool calling), 'No Extended Thinking' evaluation table row, exact quote: 'Tool Calling | BFCL | 92.3 | ...'. No version number (v1/v2/v3) is specified on the model card, so mapped to the unversioned 'bfcl' slug rather than forcing 'bfcl-v3'. Not previously tracked for this variant.

verificationNotes: Same verification basis as the Thinking variant (official HF blog + model card, 2025-07-08 release, 3.08B params, Apache 2.0, 128K ctx). All four No-Thinking benchmark rows (AIME 2025 9.3, GPQA Diamond 35.7, IFEval 76.7, LiveCodeBench v4 15.2) confirmed verbatim on the official model card's benchmark comparison table.
